results.prompt: What are the top 5 most-activated analytics modules in the last 90 days? List each module's name, business function, activation count, and subscription revenue.
results.output:
| Module Name | Business Function | Activation Count | Subscription Revenue |
|-------------|-------------------|------------------|---------------------|
| Territory Performance Analyzer | Sales & Marketing | 39 | 652500.0 |
| Talent Retention Predictor | HR & People | 36 | 891000.0 |
| Order Fulfilment Tracker | Supply Chain | 33 | 379500.0 |
| IP Portfolio Analyzer | Research & Development | 30 | 750000.0 |
| Trial Success Probability Model | Research & Development | 27 | 1104000.0 |
